```{python}
import pandas
import numpy
import joblib
import tensorflow

from tensorflow import keras
from tensorflow.keras import Sequential
from tensorflow.keras.layers import Conv2D, MaxPooling2D, Dropout, Flatten, Dense

from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler
from sklearn.metrics import root_mean_squared_error, r2_score
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
```

```{python}
bikes = pandas.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/byui-cse/cse450-course/master/data/bikes.csv")
```

```{python}
def features(df):
    #Creating 'days to holiday'
    df['date'] = pandas.to_datetime(df['dteday'], format='%m/%d/%Y')

    holidays = df.loc[df['holiday'] == 1, ['date']].sort_values('date').drop_duplicates()
    holidays = holidays.rename(columns={'date': 'holiday_date'})

    df_sorted = df.sort_values('date')

    next_hol = pandas.merge_asof(
    df_sorted[['date']], 
    holidays, 
    left_on='date', 
    right_on='holiday_date', 
    direction='forward'
    )

    prev_hol = pandas.merge_asof(
    df_sorted[['date']], 
    holidays, 
    left_on='date', 
    right_on='holiday_date', 
    direction='backward'
    )

    days_to_next = (next_hol['holiday_date'] - df_sorted['date']).dt.days
    days_to_prev = (df_sorted['date'] - prev_hol['holiday_date']).dt.days

    days_to_closest = pandas.concat([days_to_next, days_to_prev], axis=1).min(axis=1)

    df_sorted['days_to_holiday'] = days_to_closest

    df = df_sorted.sort_index()

    df['dteday'] = pandas.to_datetime(df['dteday'])

    #  year
    df['year'] = df['dteday'].dt.year

    # month cycle
    df['month'] = df['dteday'].dt.month
    df['month_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * df['month'] / 12)
    df['month_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * df['month'] / 12)

    # day of year cycle
    df['day_of_year'] = df['dteday'].dt.dayofyear
    df['day_of_year_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * df['day_of_year'] / 365)
    df['day_of_year_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * df['day_of_year'] / 365)

    # day cycle
    df['day_of_week'] = df['dteday'].dt.dayofweek.astype(int)
    df['day_of_week_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * df['day_of_week'] / 7)
    df['day_of_week_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * df['day_of_week'] / 7)

    #  season cycle
    df['season_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * df['season'] / 4)
    df['season_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * df['season'] / 4)

    df = df.drop(columns=["dteday", "date"])

    return(df)
```

```{python}
scaler_x = MinMaxScaler()
scaler_x2 = MinMaxScaler()
scaler_y1 = MinMaxScaler()
scaler_y2 = MinMaxScaler()  
```

```{python}
X = features(bikes)

X = X.drop(columns = ["casual", "registered"])

y1 = bikes[["casual"]]
y2 = bikes[["registered"]]

X_train, X_test, y1_train, y1_test = train_test_split(X, y1, test_size = 0.2, random_state = 69)
X_train2, X_test2, y2_train, y2_test = train_test_split(X, y2, test_size = 0.2, random_state = 69)

scaler_x.fit(X_train)
scaler_x2.fit(X_train2)
scaler_y1.fit(y1_train)
scaler_y2.fit(y2_train)

X_train_s = scaler_x.transform(X_train)
X_test_s = scaler_x.transform(X_test)

X_train_s2 = scaler_x2.transform(X_train2)
X_test_s2 = scaler_x2.transform(X_test2)

y1_train_s = scaler_y1.transform(y1_train)
y1_test_s = scaler_y1.transform(y1_test)

y2_train_s = scaler_y2.transform(y2_train)
y2_test_s = scaler_y2.transform(y2_test)
```

```{python}
y1_model = Sequential()
y1_model.add(Dense(128, input_dim=X_train_s.shape[1], activation='swish'))
y1_model.add(Dropout(.25))
y1_model.add(Dense(256, activation='relu'))
y1_model.add(Dropout(.3))
y1_model.add(Dense(300, activation='leaky_relu'))
y1_model.add(Dropout(.5))
y1_model.add(Dense(200, activation = 'swish'))
y1_model.add(Dropout(0.3))
y1_model.add(Dense(100, activation = 'swish'))
y1_model.add(Dropout(0.25))
y1_model.add(Dense(30, activation = 'leaky_relu'))
y1_model.add(Dropout(0.2))
y1_model.add(Dense(1, activation='linear'))
```

```{python}
opt = keras.optimizers.Adam(learning_rate=0.0005)
y1_model.compile(loss="mean_squared_error", optimizer=opt, metrics=['mse'])
```

```{python}
early_stop = keras.callbacks.EarlyStopping(monitor='val_mse', patience=30)

history = y1_model.fit(
    X_train_s, 
    y1_train_s, 
    epochs=2000, 
    validation_split=0.5, 
    batch_size=256,       
    callbacks=[early_stop], 
    shuffle=True          
)
```

```{python}
y1_preds = y1_model.predict(X_test_s)
final_casual = scaler_y1.inverse_transform(y1_preds)

y1_model.save("motion_model1.keras")
joblib.dump(scaler_x, "scaler_x1.pkl")
joblib.dump(scaler_y1, "scaler_y1.pkl")
```

```{python}
hist = pandas.DataFrame(history.history)
```

```{python}
y2_model = Sequential()
y2_model.add(Dense(128, input_dim=X_train_s2.shape[1], activation='swish'))
y2_model.add(Dropout(.25))
y2_model.add(Dense(256, activation='relu'))
y2_model.add(Dropout(.3))
y2_model.add(Dense(300, activation='leaky_relu'))
y2_model.add(Dropout(.5))
y2_model.add(Dense(200, activation = 'swish'))
y2_model.add(Dropout(0.3))
y2_model.add(Dense(100, activation = 'swish'))
y2_model.add(Dropout(0.25))
y2_model.add(Dense(30, activation = 'leaky_relu'))
y2_model.add(Dropout(0.2))
y2_model.add(Dense(1, activation='linear'))
```

```{python}
opt = keras.optimizers.Adam(learning_rate=0.0005)
early_stop = keras.callbacks.EarlyStopping(monitor='val_mse', patience=30)

y2_model.compile(loss="mean_squared_error", optimizer=opt, metrics=['mse'])

history2 = y2_model.fit(
    X_train_s2, 
    y2_train_s, 
    epochs=2000, 
    validation_split=0.5, 
    batch_size=256,       
    callbacks=[early_stop], 
    shuffle=True          
)
```

```{python}
y2_preds = y2_model.predict(X_test_s)
final_casual = scaler_y2.inverse_transform(y2_preds)

y2_model.save("motion_model2.keras")
joblib.dump(scaler_x, "scaler_x2.pkl")
joblib.dump(scaler_y2, "scaler_y2.pkl")
```

```{python}
hist2 = pandas.DataFrame(history2.history)
```

```{python}
mini = pandas.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/byui-cse/cse450-course/master/data/biking_holdout_test_mini.csv")
```

```{python}
new_mini = features(mini)
```

```{python}
mini_scale1 = scaler_x.transform(new_mini) 
mini_scale2 = scaler_x2.transform(new_mini)
```

```{python}
motion1 = tensorflow.keras.models.load_model('motion_model1.keras')
motion2 = tensorflow.keras.models.load_model('motion_model2.keras')
```

```{python}
predictions1 = motion1.predict(mini_scale1)
predictions2 = motion2.predict(mini_scale2)

close1 = scaler_y1.inverse_transform(predictions1)
close2 = scaler_y2.inverse_transform(predictions2)

closer = pandas.DataFrame()
closer['casual'] = close1.flatten()
closer['registered'] = close2.flatten()
closer['total'] = closer['casual'] + closer['registered']

final = pandas.DataFrame()
final['predictions'] = closer['total']
```

```{python}
final.to_csv('motion-predictions.csv', index=False)
```

```{python}
holdout = pandas.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/byui-cse/cse450-course/master/data/bikes_december.csv")
```

```{python}
big_holdout = features(holdout)
```

```{python}
big_scale1 = scaler_x.transform(big_holdout) 
big_scale2 = scaler_x2.transform(big_holdout)
```

```{python}
big_pred1 = motion1.predict(big_scale1)
big_pred2 = motion2.predict(big_scale2)
```

```{python}
rev1 = scaler_y1.inverse_transform(big_pred1)
rev2 = scaler_y2.inverse_transform(big_pred2)

closest = pandas.DataFrame()
closest['casual'] = rev1.flatten()
closest['registered'] = rev2.flatten()
closest['total'] = closest['casual'] + closest['registered']

big_predictions = pandas.DataFrame()
big_predictions['predictions'] = closest['total']

big_predictions.to_csv('real-big-motion-predictions.csv', index=False)
```

Last freakin' dataset to do I guess
```{python}
last = pandas.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/byui-cse/cse450-course/master/data/bikes_december.csv")
```

```{python}
idk_anymore = features(last)
last_scale1 = scaler_x.transform(idk_anymore)
last_scale2 = scaler_x2.transform(idk_anymore)
last_pred1 = motion1.predict(last_scale1)
last_pred2 = motion2.predict(last_scale2)

undo = scaler_y1.inverse_transform(last_pred1)
undo2 = scaler_y2.inverse_transform(last_pred2)

datathang = pandas.DataFrame()
datathang['casual'] = undo.flatten()
datathang['registered'] = undo2.flatten()
datathang['total'] = datathang['casual'] + datathang['registered']

done = pandas.DataFrame()
done['predictions'] = datathang['total']
```

```{python}
done.to_csv('december.csv', index=False)
```
